name_it: Saints Basil the Great and Gregory Nazianzen, bishops and doctors
name_en: Saints Basil the Great and Gregory Nazianzen, bishops and doctors
name_es: Saints Basil the Great and Gregory Nazianzen, bishops and doctors
name_pt: Saints Basil the Great and Gregory Nazianzen, bishops and doctors
bio_en: Basil of Caesarea, also called Saint Basil the Great, was an early Christian prelate of the who served as Bishop of Caesarea Mazaca in Cappadocia from 370 until his death in 379. He was an influential theologian who supported the Nicene Creed and opposed heresies within the early Christian church such as Arianism and Apollinarianism.
